da.hero_title: Din rejse mod at blive yogalærer
da.hero_subtitle: Drømmer du om at blive yogalærer – eller fordybe dig i yogaens verden? Vores 200-timers uddannelse er en komplet, klassisk grunduddannelse, der giver dig et solidt fundament i både teori og praksis.
da.hero_subtext: Designet til alle niveauer – det perfekte udgangspunkt for dig, der vil undervise professionelt eller styrke din egen praksis i dybden.
da.hero_acc1_body: Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin og Hot Yoga. Vi går i dybden med teknik, justeringer og forståelsen af hver stil, så du kan undervise sikkert og tydeligt.
da.hero_acc2_body: Funktionel viden om knogler, led, muskler og nervesystem – forklaret enkelt og praktisk, så du trygt kan støtte forskellige kroppe.
da.hero_acc3_body: Oprindelse, formål og udvikling – og hvordan klassiske principper oversættes meningsfuldt til det moderne menneske.
da.hero_acc4_body: Skab en tryg, inspirerende atmosfære, håndtér forskellige elevtyper og opbyg selvtillid som underviser.
da.hero_acc5_body: Planlæg, strukturer og guid klasser med tydelighed, nærvær og autenticitet – fra intro til afslapning.
da.hero_acc6_body: Sammensæt sikre, flydende og meningsfulde sekvenser med temaer, progression og musikvalg.
da.hero_acc7_body: Unikt hos Yoga Bible: konkrete erfaringer om karriereveje – fra at starte som underviser til at åbne eget studie eller planlægge retreats.
da.hours_lead: Bliv certificeret til at undervise Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga & Meditation. Nedenfor ser du et enkelt overblik over timefordelingen.
da.hours_mod1_desc: Stærke grundfundamenter, aktive stillinger i roligt tempo og tydeligt class management.
da.hours_mod2_desc: Flow og åndedræt koblet med kreativ sekvensering – design sikre, klare forløb.
da.hours_mod3_desc: Rolige, længere hold der arbejder i bindevævet. Meridianforståelse og praktisk sekvensering.
da.hours_mod4_desc: Funktionel anatomi for led, muskler og nervesystem – forklaret enkelt og brugbart.
da.hours_mod5_desc: Historie og nøglebegreber – integreret i moderne praksis og undervisning.
da.hours_mod6_desc: 60 studietimer inkl. adgang til klasser + 20 t. opgaver + 10 t. hjemme-/online praksis.
da.hours_note: Internationalt anerkendt Yoga Alliance 200-hr certificering. Velegnet til alle niveauer.
da.cred_lead: Uddannelsen er Yoga Alliance-certificeret og undervises af erfarne lærere med mange års erfaring i både undervisning, anatomi, filosofi og yogapraksis.
da.cred_body: Vi har mere end 10 års erfaring med at uddanne yogalærere og over 500 studerende har allerede gennemført vores programmer siden 2014 – tidligere kendt som Triangle Yoga Academy.
da.cred_quote: Det er mere end en uddannelse – det er en rejse mod indsigt, dyb forståelse og professionel udvikling.
da.breakdown_lead1: Vores 200-timers yogauddannelse kombinerer teori, praksis og personlig udvikling. Metoden er afprøvet og virker: op til 95% af vores dimittender står trygt foran en klasse ved afslutning.
da.breakdown_lead2: Når du certificeres i Hatha, Vinyasa og Yin – tre af de mest udbredte stilarter i verden – kan du undervise alle niveauer på tværs af stilarter.
da.breakdown_note: Kan du ikke deltage fysisk en dag, kan du deltage online på udvalgte workshops eller se optagelsen efterfølgende.
da.breakdown_a1_body:
I løbet af uddannelsen deltager du i 60 yogaklasser i vores studie i Christianshavn. Du kan frit vælge mellem Hot Yoga, Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin og Bikram Variation samt temaworkshops.

Unik fleksibilitet: Så snart du har betalt depositum, kan du begynde at praktisere disse timer – selv før holdstart.
da.breakdown_a2_body: Du observerer undervisning i andre studier og analyserer udvalgte online-klasser. Det giver indsigt i, hvordan forskellige lærere strukturerer klasser og skaber atmosfære.
da.breakdown_a3_body: Du lærer Vinyasaens filosofi, historie, teknik, sekvensering, alignment og cueing. Fokus er logik, sikkerhed og flow – så du kan lede blandede niveauer med overblik.
da.breakdown_a4_body: Fordybelse i Yin: stillinger, varighed, støtte, bindevæv og nervesystem. Du lærer at undervise Yin trygt og nærværende.
da.breakdown_a5_body: Klassiske Hatha-principper, korrekt teknik og åndedræt. Du bygger styrke, fokus og balance.
da.breakdown_a6_body: Bliv en klar, professionel og inspirerende underviser. Klassepsykologi, stemmetræning, tilstedeværelse og guidning.
da.breakdown_a7_body:
Muskler, led og skelet, samt åndedræts-, nerve-, kredsløbs- og fordøjelsessystemer. Du lærer, hvordan yoga påvirker kroppen og hvordan skader undgås.

Typisk planlagt som 4-timers sessioner.
da.breakdown_a8_body:
Hvad er yoga ud over det fysiske? Historie, traditioner og filosofiske grundlag.

Online i 3-timers moduler. Kan følges live eller ses som optagelse.
da.breakdown_a9_body: Løbende opgaver fra underviserne hjælper dig med at reflektere og anvende stoffet. Du træner praktisk undervisning med ægte elever.
da.online_lead: Vi sikrer, at du kan følge med – også når livet sker.
da.online_text1: Vi tror, at en seriøs yogalæreruddannelse sker fysisk: reel praksis, observation, deltagelse på åbne hold, forskellige lærere – og workshops med spørgsmål og direkte feedback.
da.online_text2: Livet sker: sygdom og aftaler må ikke betyde, at du mister et emne eller sakker bagud.
da.online_detail1: Vi har installeret et professionelt audio- og videosetup i yogasalen. Med få klik får du et live-link i høj kvalitet og lav latenstid – set oppefra med overblik over lærer og hele salen.
da.online_detail2: Kan du ikke deltage live? Alle sessioner er live-optagede – du modtager optagelsen i dit medlemsområde bagefter. Ikke forudindspillet – den ægte workshop.
da.online_detail3: Er en 5-timers workshop for lang at gense? Du får en kort opsummering af hovedpointer og øvelser.
da.online_detail4: Alle studerende får adgang til et personligt medlemsområde med live-sessioner, live-optagede workshops og materialebibliotek – adgangen beholdes også efter uddannelsen.
da.online_result: Resultat: Du kommer aldrig bagud – og dit bibliotek forbliver tilgængeligt for altid.
da.online_check1: Du modtager et personligt live- eller optagelseslink.
da.online_check2: Log ind fra telefon, tablet eller computer – lav latenstid.
da.online_check3: Kamera fra oven giver overblik over underviser og sal.
da.ya_title: Yoga Alliance USA – Hvorfor det betyder noget
da.ya_lead: En Yoga Alliance-certificeret uddannelse løfter dit bevis – og forpligter os til opdaterede standarder, gennemsigtighed og kvalitet.
da.ya_faq1_a: RYS = Registered Yoga School (fx RYS 200). RYT = Registered Yoga Teacher – dit personlige certifikat hos Yoga Alliance.
da.ya_faq2_a: Ja. RYT er globalt genkendt og gør jobansøgninger lettere. Studier kigger stadig på erfaring og match – men RYT åbner døre.
da.ya_faq3_a: Forløb kører primært på engelsk for international anvendelighed. Vi støtter dig i dansk terminologi, cues og materialer.
da.ya_faq4_a: Tag 200H hos os → vælg en 300H Advanced YTT (vi planlægger hold fra 2026) → registrér som RYT 500.
da.ya_style1_desc: Den klassiske form — både statisk og dynamisk. Styrker balance, fokus, fleksibilitet og koncentration. Grundlaget for al yogaundervisning.
da.ya_style2_desc: Dynamisk, kreativt og fysisk udfordrende. Verdens mest populære yogastil — og den mest efterspurgte i studier og fitnesscentre.
da.ya_style3_desc: Lange stræk, dyb restitution og fleksibilitet. Idéel til at komplementere dynamiske stilarter og guide elever i ro og tålmodighed.
da.ya_style4_desc: Undervis i opvarmet miljø. Du lærer forskellen på heated og non-heated undervisning — og kan certificere dig i begge.
da.ya_style5_desc: Guide dine elever sikkert gennem meditation og åndedrætsøvelser — en uundværlig del af professionel yogaundervisning.
da.ya_door1: Undervis over hele verden — certificeringen er anerkendt internationalt, så du kan undervise mens du rejser eller flytter til et andet land.
da.ya_door2: Start dit eget studie — med RYT-200 kan du oprette dine egne klasser, workshops og kurser med troværdighed og kvalitetsstempel.
da.ya_door3: Certificér andre i fremtiden — med erfaring kan du oprette din egen skole via Yoga Alliance USA og uddanne kommende yogalærere.
da.ya_door4: Videreuddannelse — fortsæt til 300-timers avanceret program og bliv RYT-500 certificeret for endnu flere muligheder.
da.ya_door5: Bred karriereadgang — fra yogastudier og fitnesscentre til corporate wellness, retreats og online undervisning.
da.ya_closing: Certificeringen er bred og alligevel dybt professionel — den giver dig en solid base til at undervise enhver yogastil og åbner karrieremuligheder du måske ikke havde forestillet dig.
da.teachers_lead: Vores underviserteam dækker alle aspekter af din uddannelse – fra Vinyasa og Hot Yoga til anatomi, filosofi og Yin. De er ikke blot certificerede – de er aktive lærere, der står på måtten hver dag.
da.teachers1_bio: Grundlægger af Yoga Bible og tidligere Triangle Yoga Academy. Shamir har uddannet over 500 yogalærere siden 2014 og underviser i Vinyasa, Hatha og Hot Yoga. Han sætter kvalitet over profit og skaber et uddannelsesmiljø, der er grundigt, ærligt og dybt engageret.
da.teachers2_bio: Over 20 års yogarejse og et årti som instruktør og lead trainer med mere end 3.000 undervisningstimer. Anna har turneret internationalt med Patrick Beach og er ekspert i inversioner, arm balances og kreativ Vinyasa-sekvensering. Kendt for skarp indsigt, struktur og kreativitet.
da.teachers3_bio: Charlotte har en klar, direkte undervisningsstil, der gør kroppen forståelig. Specialiseret i funktionel anatomi og skadeforebyggelse – hun oversætter kompleks viden om knogler, led og muskler til brugbare redskaber for kommende yogalærere.
da.teachers4_bio: Eva underviser i yogafilosofi på en måde, der forbinder de klassiske tekster med hverdagen. Hun fordyber sig i Yin Yoga, meditation og den indre rejse – og bringer ro, nærvær og dybde til uddannelsen.
da.practice_lead: En unik del af din uddannelse: du gennemfører 60 yogaklasser som en del af pensum. Det er her, teorien bliver til krop og erfaring – og du bestemmer selv hvor og hvornår.
da.practice_text1: Du kan praktisere i vores studie i Christianshavn eller i dit eget yndlingsstudie. Bor du uden for København, kan du tage op til 30 timer i din hjemby – resten tager du hos os.
da.practice_text2: Så snart du har betalt dit depositum, får du fuld adgang til alle klasser – du kan begynde at praktisere dine 60 timer allerede før holdstart.
da.practice_highlight: Start dine timer allerede før uddannelsen begynder
da.practice_check1: Frit valg mellem alle stilarter – Hot Yoga, Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin og mere
da.practice_check2: Praktisér i dit eget studie eller hos os i Christianshavn
da.practice_check3: Op til 30 timer i din hjemby – perfekt for dig uden for København
da.practice_check4: Øv med forskellige undervisere for bredere perspektiv
da.location_lead: Uddannelsen foregår i vores studie i hjertet af Christianshavn, København. Et autentisk, dedikeret yogarum med professionelt udstyr til både fysisk undervisning og online streaming.
da.location_feature1_desc: Stort, lyst rum med plads til workshops, praksis og gruppearbejde.
da.location_feature2_desc: Kamera og mikrofon fra oven – klar til live-deltagelse og optagelser.
da.location_feature3_desc: Christianshavn, København – tæt på metro, bus og cykelruter.
da.location_feature4_desc: Omklædningsrum med brusere, opbevaringsplads og alt hvad du har brug for.
da.reviews_lead: Uddannelsen har hjulpet 500+ elever videre — nogle fordyber egen praksis, andre underviser ved siden af et hovedjob, og flere er gået heltidsvejen med egne studier og retreats.

reviews.name: Tanja E.
reviews.text: Varmt, venligt miljø og kompetente lærere. God balance mellem praksis og den filosofiske del – stærk forståelse for anatomi.

reviews.name: Sara Gerlee
reviews.text: 200-timers forløb var transformerende. Vidende og støttende team – studiet føles som et andet hjem, for både nye og erfarne.

reviews.name: Clara Aagaard
reviews.text: Holistisk læringsmiljø med plads til spørgsmål og praksisfokus. Dygtige undervisere og anvendelige værktøjer til klasseledelse.

reviews.name: Liza Westh
reviews.text: Min varmeste anbefaling. 200 timer i class management, anatomi og praksis – følte mig optimalt forberedt som yogalærer.

reviews.name: Signe Schmidt
reviews.text: Effektiv 18-ugers uddannelse i anatomi, filosofi og praksis (yin, vinyasa, hatha) – i en smuk sal med dagslys og grønne planter.

reviews.name: Meg Ellis
reviews.text: Ekstraordinært studie og lærerteam. 200t forløb forbereder dig fuldt — perfekt til både fordybelse og undervisning.

reviews.name: Kama Krystel
reviews.text: Velstruktureret intensivt forløb, der blander teori og praksis. Personlig feedback og støttende community – kan varmt anbefales.

reviews.name: Giorgianna G.
reviews.text: Udfordrende og belønnende. Unikt fokus på class management. Fem stjerner for de dygtige lærere og forberedelse til at undervise.

reviews.name: Helena Bend...
reviews.text: Kan virkelig anbefale uddannelsen – 5 lærerige måneder. Jeg føler mig godt klædt på til at fortsætte som yogalærer.

reviews.name: Tonje Follum
reviews.text: Inspiration, stor detaljegrad og varmt miljø. Fantastisk atmosfære med planter, lys og musik – mit yndlings-yogafællesskab.

reviews.name: Ping Li
reviews.text: Afsluttede netop min 200t – stor mental & fysisk udvikling. Dybt professionelt team. Meget glad for min rejse her.

reviews.name: Camilla Rend...
reviews.text: Nyuddannet instruktør – føler mig klar i hatha, vinyasa og yin. Hårdt arbejde, men det værd. Anbefales til både udøvere og kommende instruktører.

da.formats_lead: Alle tre formater giver dig nøjagtig samme 200-timers Yoga Alliance-certificering, samme undervisere og samme pensum. Forskellen er tempoet – vælg det der passer dit liv.
da.formats_same_note: Alle programmer: Samme undervisere · Samme pensum · Samme certificering
da.format1_desc: Workshops enten på hverdage eller weekender – du kan skifte undervejs. Perfekt hvis du arbejder fuldtid eller studerer.
da.format1_suitable: Ideel til dig med fuldtidsjob eller studier
da.format2_desc: En fordybende mellemvej – 3-4 dage om ugen. Du kan stadig arbejde deltid ved siden af.
da.format2_suitable: Ideel til dig der kan tage deltid fri
da.format3_desc: Fuld fordybelse, 3-4 workshops om ugen á 5-6 timer. Til dig der vil have alt samlet i én intensiv måned.
da.format3_suitable: Ideel til dig med fuld tid til rådighed
da.pricing_lead: Én pris – alt inkluderet. Ingen skjulte gebyrer. Her ser du præcis, hvad din uddannelse dækker.
da.pricing_row1_desc: Vinyasa, Hatha, Yin, klasseledelse, sequencing og undervisningsmetodik – alle live workshops inkluderet.
da.pricing_row2_desc: Fuld adgang til alle åbne klasser – Hot Yoga, Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin & Bikram Variation. Start allerede før holdstart.
da.pricing_row3_desc: Komplet undervisningsmateriale, online platform med optagelser, opsummeringer og supplerende ressourcer.
da.pricing_row4_desc: Yoga Alliance registrering, eksamination, feedback-sessioner og dit officielle RYT 200-certifikat.
da.pricing_deposit: Depositum: 3.750 kr ved tilmelding – giver øjeblikkelig adgang til alle klasser
da.faq_lead: Her finder du svar på de mest almindelige spørgsmål om uddannelsen. Kan du ikke finde svaret? Kontakt os direkte.
da.faq1_a: Uddannelsen er for alle niveauer – fra begyndere til erfarne yogaudøvere. Du behøver ikke at kunne lave en håndstand for at starte. Vi møder dig, hvor du er.
da.faq2_a: I vores studie i Christianshavn, København. Filosofimodulerne foregår online, og alle workshops har online backup.
da.faq3_a: Du deltager i 60 yogaklasser i studiet som en del af uddannelsen. Du vælger selv mellem Hot Yoga, Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin og Bikram Variation. Du kan starte allerede når du betaler depositum – før holdstart.
da.faq4_a: Ja. Du betaler 3.750 kr i depositum ved tilmelding, som giver dig øjeblikkelig adgang til alle klasser og booking. Resten kan deles op – kontakt os for en afdragsordning der passer dig.
da.faq5_a: Til workshops: Komfortabelt tøj, en let snack og vandflaske. Til klasser: Yogamåtte (kan købes eller lejes i studiet), håndklæde og vandflaske. Ønsker du at tage mere end én klasse i træk, medbring et friskt sæt tøj og et praksis-håndklæde til hver klasse.
da.faq6_q: Er uddannelsen på dansk eller engelsk?
da.faq6_a: Workshopdelen er primært på engelsk for international anvendelighed. Vi støtter dig med dansk terminologi, cues og materialer, så du kan undervise på begge sprog.
da.faq7_q: Hvad sker der, hvis jeg bliver syg?
da.faq7_a: Vi har et stærkt online backup-system. Du kan deltage live via video, se optagelser bagefter, eller modtage en opsummering. Du kommer aldrig bagud.
da.faq8_a: Ja. Du modtager et Yoga Alliance RYT 200-certifikat, som er internationalt anerkendt. Op til 95% af vores dimittender står trygt foran en klasse ved afslutning.
da.faq9_a: Som studerende får du adgang til et personligt medlemsområde, hvor du kan deltage i live-sessioner, se live-optagede workshops (ikke forudindspillede), og tilgå et bibliotek med materialer. Du beholder adgangen til biblioteket også efter uddannelsen er afsluttet.
da.faq10_q: Hvad er fordelene ved en 200-timers uddannelse?
da.faq10_a: En 200-timers YTT er en livslang investering i dig selv. Du opbygger selvtillid, lærer at tale foran grupper og guide andre. Du får dyb viden om krop og sind, og du kan hjælpe familie og venner. Mange skaber en helt ny livsstil og et sundt netværk ud af det.
da.faq_contact: Har du flere spørgsmål? Kontakt os
da.benefits_lead: En 200-timers yogalæreruddannelse er mere end et certifikat – det er en livslang investering i din personlige, professionelle og spirituelle udvikling.
da.benefits1_desc: Opbyg selvtillid, lær at tale foran grupper, og opdag en dybere forbindelse til dig selv. Du lærer at guide andre med ro og autenticitet.
da.benefits2_desc: Bliv certificeret yogalærer med international anerkendelse. Undervise i studier, planlæg retreats, eller åbn dit eget studie.
da.benefits3_desc: Forståelse af yogaens filosofi, meditation og åndedræt – redskaber til livslang indre udvikling.
da.benefits4_desc: Dyb viden om anatomi, fysiologi og det mentale – hjælp dig selv, familie og venner til et sundere liv.
da.benefits5_desc: Bliv del af et sundt, inspirerende fællesskab. Mange skaber en helt ny livsstil og karriere ud af uddannelsen.
da.benefits6_desc: Lær at stå foran en gruppe med selvtillid, tydelighed og nærvær – en færdighed der rækker langt ud over yogamåtten.
da.cta_title: Klar til at starte din rejse?
da.cta_text: Få skemaet og ansøg i dag. Næste hold starter snart.

en.hero_title: Your journey to becoming a yoga teacher
en.hero_subtitle: Do you dream of becoming a yoga teacher – or diving deeper into the world of yoga? Our 200-hour training is a complete, classical foundation that gives you a solid base in both theory and practice.
en.hero_subtext: Designed for all levels – the perfect starting point for those who want to teach professionally or deepen their own practice.
en.hero_acc1_body: Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin and Hot Yoga. We go deep into technique, adjustments and understanding of each style, so you can teach safely and clearly.
en.hero_acc2_body: Functional knowledge of bones, joints, muscles and the nervous system – explained simply and practically, so you can confidently support different bodies.
en.hero_acc3_body: Origins, purpose and evolution – and how classical principles translate meaningfully to the modern human.
en.hero_acc4_body: Create a safe, inspiring atmosphere, handle different student types and build confidence as a teacher.
en.hero_acc5_body: Plan, structure and guide classes with clarity, presence and authenticity – from intro to relaxation.
en.hero_acc6_body: Create safe, flowing and meaningful sequences with themes, progression and music selection.
en.hero_acc7_body: Unique to Yoga Bible: practical insights on career paths – from starting as a teacher to opening your own studio or planning retreats.
en.hours_lead: Get certified to teach Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga & Meditation. Below you'll find a simple overview of the hour distribution.
en.hours_mod1_desc: Strong foundations, active postures at a calm pace and clear class management.
en.hours_mod2_desc: Flow and breath coupled with creative sequencing – design safe, clear progressions.
en.hours_mod3_desc: Calm, longer holds working in connective tissue. Meridian understanding and practical sequencing.
en.hours_mod4_desc: Functional anatomy for joints, muscles and the nervous system – explained simply and practically.
en.hours_mod5_desc: History and key concepts – integrated into modern practice and teaching.
en.hours_mod6_desc: 60 study hours incl. class access + 20 hrs assignments + 10 hrs home/online practice.
en.hours_note: Internationally recognized Yoga Alliance 200-hr certification. Suitable for all levels.
en.cred_lead: The training is Yoga Alliance certified and taught by experienced teachers with many years of experience in teaching, anatomy, philosophy and yoga practice.
en.cred_body: We have more than 10 years of experience training yoga teachers and over 500 students have already completed our programs since 2014 – previously known as Triangle Yoga Academy.
en.cred_quote: It is more than an education – it is a journey toward insight, deep understanding and professional development.
en.breakdown_lead1: Our 200-hour yoga teacher training combines theory, practice and personal development. The method is tried and tested: up to 95% of our graduates stand confidently in front of a class at completion.
en.breakdown_lead2: When you certify in Hatha, Vinyasa and Yin – three of the most widespread styles in the world – you can teach all levels across styles.
en.breakdown_note: Can't attend in person? You can participate online for selected workshops or watch the recording afterwards.
en.breakdown_a1_body:
During the training you participate in 60 yoga classes at our studio in Christianshavn. You can freely choose between Hot Yoga, Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin and Bikram Variation plus themed workshops.

Unique flexibility: As soon as you've paid the deposit, you can start practicing these hours – even before the course starts.
en.breakdown_a2_body: You observe teaching at other studios and analyze selected online classes. This provides insight into how different teachers structure classes and create atmosphere.
en.breakdown_a3_body: You learn Vinyasa philosophy, history, technique, sequencing, alignment and cueing. The focus is logic, safety and flow – so you can lead mixed levels with confidence.
en.breakdown_a4_body: Deep dive into Yin: poses, duration, support, connective tissue and the nervous system. You learn to teach Yin safely and with presence.
en.breakdown_a5_body: Classical Hatha principles, correct technique and breathwork. You build strength, focus and balance.
en.breakdown_a6_body: Become a clear, professional and inspiring teacher. Class psychology, voice training, presence and guidance.
en.breakdown_a7_body:
Muscles, joints and skeleton, plus respiratory, nervous, circulatory and digestive systems. You learn how yoga affects the body and how injuries are prevented.

Typically scheduled as 4-hour sessions.
en.breakdown_a8_body:
What is yoga beyond the physical? History, traditions and philosophical foundations.

Online in 3-hour modules. Join live or watch the recording.
en.breakdown_a9_body: Ongoing assignments from the teachers help you reflect on and apply the material. You practice teaching with real students.
en.online_lead: We make sure you can keep up – even when life happens.
en.online_text1: We believe a serious yoga teacher training happens in person: real practice, observation, participation in open classes, different teachers – and workshops with questions and direct feedback.
en.online_text2: Life happens: illness and appointments shouldn't mean you miss a topic or fall behind.
en.online_detail1: We have installed a professional audio and video setup in the yoga hall. With a few clicks you get a high-quality live link with low latency – viewed from above with an overview of the teacher and the entire room.
en.online_detail2: Can't join live? All sessions are live recorded – you receive the recording in your member area afterwards. Not pre-recorded – the real workshop.
en.online_detail3: Is a 5-hour workshop too long to rewatch? You get a short summary of key points and exercises.
en.online_detail4: All students get access to a personal member area with live sessions, live-recorded workshops and resource library – access is kept even after the training ends.
en.online_result: Result: You never fall behind – and your library stays accessible forever.
en.online_check1: You receive a personal live or recording link.
en.online_check2: Log in from phone, tablet or computer – low latency.
en.online_check3: Camera from above gives an overview of the teacher and room.
en.ya_title: Yoga Alliance USA – Why It Matters
en.ya_lead: A Yoga Alliance certified training elevates your credentials – and commits us to updated standards, transparency and quality.
en.ya_faq1_a: RYS = Registered Yoga School (e.g. RYS 200). RYT = Registered Yoga Teacher – your personal certificate with Yoga Alliance.
en.ya_faq2_a: Yes. RYT is globally recognized and makes job applications easier. Studios still look at experience and fit – but RYT opens doors.
en.ya_faq3_a: Programs run primarily in English for international applicability. We support you with Danish terminology, cues and materials.
en.ya_faq4_a: Take 200H with us → choose a 300H Advanced YTT (we're planning cohorts from 2026) → register as RYT 500.
en.ya_style1_desc: The classical form — both static and dynamic. Builds balance, focus, flexibility and concentration. The foundation for all yoga teaching.
en.ya_style2_desc: Dynamic, creative and physically challenging. The world's most popular yoga style — and the most in-demand at studios and fitness centers.
en.ya_style3_desc: Long holds, deep restoration and flexibility. Ideal for complementing dynamic styles and guiding students in stillness and patience.
en.ya_style4_desc: Teach in a heated environment. You learn the difference between heated and non-heated teaching — and can certify in both.
en.ya_style5_desc: Guide your students safely through meditation and breathing exercises — an essential part of professional yoga teaching.
en.ya_door1: Teach worldwide — the certification is internationally recognized, so you can teach while traveling or if you move to another country.
en.ya_door2: Start your own studio — with RYT-200 you can create your own classes, workshops and courses with credibility and a quality seal.
en.ya_door3: Certify others in the future — with experience you can establish your own school through Yoga Alliance USA and train future yoga teachers.
en.ya_door4: Further education — continue to the 300-hour advanced program and become RYT-500 certified for even more opportunities.
en.ya_door5: Broad career access — from yoga studios and fitness centers to corporate wellness, retreats and online teaching.
en.ya_closing: The certification is broad yet deeply professional — it gives you a solid foundation to teach any yoga style and opens career opportunities you may not have imagined.
en.teachers_lead: Our teaching team covers every aspect of your training – from Vinyasa and Hot Yoga to anatomy, philosophy and Yin. They are not just certified – they are active teachers who step on the mat every day.
en.teachers1_bio: Founder of Yoga Bible and former Triangle Yoga Academy. Shamir has trained over 500 yoga teachers since 2014 and teaches Vinyasa, Hatha and Hot Yoga. He puts quality over profit and creates a training environment that is thorough, honest and deeply committed.
en.teachers2_bio: Over 20 years of yoga journey and a decade as instructor and lead trainer with more than 3,000 teaching hours. Anna has toured internationally with Patrick Beach and is an expert in inversions, arm balances and creative Vinyasa sequencing. Known for sharp insight, structure and creativity.
en.teachers3_bio: Charlotte has a clear, no-nonsense teaching style that makes the body understandable. Specialized in functional anatomy and injury prevention – she translates complex knowledge about bones, joints and muscles into practical tools for aspiring yoga teachers.
en.teachers4_bio: Eva teaches yoga philosophy in a way that connects classical texts to everyday life. She immerses herself in Yin Yoga, meditation and the inner journey – bringing calm, presence and depth to the training.
en.teachers_cta: Meet the rest of the team
en.practice_lead: A unique part of your training: you complete 60 yoga classes as part of the curriculum. This is where theory becomes body and experience – and you decide where and when.
en.practice_text1: You can practice at our studio in Christianshavn or at your own favorite studio. If you live outside Copenhagen, you can take up to 30 hours in your home city – the rest you take with us.
en.practice_text2: As soon as you pay your deposit, you get full access to all classes – you can start practicing your 60 hours before the course even begins.
en.practice_highlight: Start your hours before the training even begins
en.practice_check1: Free choice between all styles – Hot Yoga, Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin and more
en.practice_check2: Practice at your own studio or at ours in Christianshavn
en.practice_check3: Up to 30 hours in your home city – perfect if you're outside Copenhagen
en.practice_check4: Practice with different teachers for broader perspective
en.location_lead: The training takes place at our studio in the heart of Christianshavn, Copenhagen. An authentic, dedicated yoga space with professional equipment for both in-person teaching and online streaming.
en.location_feature1_desc: Large, bright room with space for workshops, practice and group work.
en.location_feature2_desc: Camera and microphone from above – ready for live participation and recordings.
en.location_feature3_desc: Christianshavn, Copenhagen – close to metro, bus and bike routes.
en.location_feature4_desc: Changing rooms with showers, storage and everything you need.
en.reviews_lead: The training has helped 500+ students move forward — some deepen their personal practice, others teach alongside their main job, and several have gone full time with their own studios and retreats.

reviews.name: Tanja E.
reviews.text: Warm, friendly environment and competent teachers. Great balance between practice and philosophy — strong understanding of anatomy.

reviews.name: Sara Gerlee
reviews.text: The 200-hour program was transformative. Knowledgeable and supportive team — the studio feels like a second home for both beginners and experienced practitioners.

reviews.name: Clara Aagaard
reviews.text: Holistic learning environment with room for questions and practice focus. Skilled teachers and useful tools for class management.

reviews.name: Liza Westh
reviews.text: My warmest recommendation. 200 hours in class management, anatomy and practice — felt optimally prepared as a yoga teacher.

reviews.name: Signe Schmidt
reviews.text: Effective 18-week training in anatomy, philosophy and practice (yin, vinyasa, hatha) — in a beautiful room with daylight and green plants.

reviews.name: Meg Ellis
reviews.text: Extraordinary studio and teaching team. The 200h program prepares you fully — perfect for both deepening and teaching.

reviews.name: Kama Krystel
reviews.text: Well-structured intensive program that blends theory and practice. Personal feedback and supportive community — highly recommended.

reviews.name: Giorgianna G.
reviews.text: Challenging and rewarding. Unique focus on class management. Five stars for the skilled teachers and preparation for teaching.

reviews.name: Helena Bend...
reviews.text: Can truly recommend the training — 5 educational months. I feel well equipped to continue as a yoga teacher.

reviews.name: Tonje Follum
reviews.text: Inspiration, great attention to detail and warm environment. Fantastic atmosphere with plants, light and music — my favorite yoga community.

reviews.name: Ping Li
reviews.text: Just finished my 200h — great mental & physical development. Deeply professional team. Very happy with my journey here.

reviews.name: Camilla Rend...
reviews.text: Newly graduated instructor — feel ready in hatha, vinyasa and yin. Hard work but worth it. Recommended for both practitioners and aspiring instructors.

en.formats_lead: All three formats give you the exact same 200-hour Yoga Alliance certification, same teachers and same curriculum. The difference is the pace – choose what fits your life.
en.formats_same_note: All programs: Same teachers · Same curriculum · Same certification
en.format1_desc: Workshops on either weekdays or weekends – you can switch along the way. Perfect if you work full-time or study.
en.format1_suitable: Ideal for those with a full-time job or studies
en.format2_desc: An immersive middle ground – 3-4 days per week. You can still work part-time alongside.
en.format2_suitable: Ideal for those who can go part-time
en.format3_desc: Full immersion, 3-4 workshops per week of 5-6 hours. For you who wants everything in one intensive month.
en.format3_suitable: Ideal for those with full time available
en.pricing_lead: One price – everything included. No hidden fees. Here you can see exactly what your training covers.
en.pricing_row1_desc: Vinyasa, Hatha, Yin, class management, sequencing and teaching methodology – all live workshops included.
en.pricing_row2_desc: Full access to all open classes – Hot Yoga, Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin & Bikram Variation. Start even before the course begins.
en.pricing_row3_desc: Complete teaching materials, online platform with recordings, summaries and supplementary resources.
en.pricing_row4_desc: Yoga Alliance registration, examination, feedback sessions and your official RYT 200 certificate.
en.pricing_deposit: Deposit: 3,750 kr upon enrollment – gives immediate access to all classes
en.faq_lead: Here you'll find answers to the most common questions about the training. Can't find your answer? Contact us directly.
en.faq1_a: The training is for all levels – from beginners to experienced yoga practitioners. You don't need to be able to do a handstand to start. We meet you where you are.
en.faq2_q: Where does the training take place?
en.faq2_a: At our studio in Christianshavn, Copenhagen. Philosophy modules are online, and all workshops have online backup.
en.faq3_q: What about the 60 hours of practice?
en.faq3_a: You participate in 60 yoga classes at the studio as part of the training. You choose between Hot Yoga, Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin and Bikram Variation. You can start as soon as you pay the deposit – before the course begins.
en.faq4_a: Yes. You pay 3,750 kr deposit upon enrollment, which gives you immediate access to all classes and bookings. The rest can be split up – contact us to arrange an installment plan that suits you.
en.faq5_a: For workshops: Comfortable clothing, a light snack and water bottle. For classes: Yoga mat (can be purchased or rented at the studio), towel and water bottle. If you want to take more than one class in a row, bring a fresh set of clothes and a practice towel for each class.
en.faq6_q: Is the training in Danish or English?
en.faq6_a: The workshop part is primarily in English for international applicability. We support you with Danish terminology, cues and materials so you can teach in both languages.
en.faq7_q: What happens if I get sick?
en.faq7_a: We have a strong online backup system. You can join live via video, watch recordings afterwards, or receive a summary. You never fall behind.
en.faq8_q: Can I teach after the training?
en.faq8_a: Yes. You receive a Yoga Alliance RYT 200 certificate, which is internationally recognized. Up to 95% of our graduates stand confidently in front of a class at completion.
en.faq9_q: How does the online part and member area work?
en.faq9_a: As a student you get access to a personal member area where you can join live sessions, watch live-recorded workshops (not pre-recorded), and access a library of materials. You keep access to the library even after the training is completed.
en.faq10_q: What are the benefits of a 200-hour training?
en.faq10_a: A 200-hour YTT is a lifelong investment in yourself. You build confidence, learn to speak in front of groups and guide others. You gain deep knowledge of body and mind, and you can help family and friends. Many create an entirely new lifestyle and healthy network from it.
en.benefits_title: Benefits of a Yoga Teacher Training
en.benefits_lead: A 200-hour yoga teacher training is more than a certificate – it is a lifelong investment in your personal, professional and spiritual growth.
en.benefits1_desc: Build self-confidence, learn to speak in front of groups, and discover a deeper connection to yourself. You learn to guide others with calm and authenticity.
en.benefits2_desc: Become a certified yoga teacher with international recognition. Teach at studios, plan retreats, or open your own studio.
en.benefits3_desc: Understanding of yoga philosophy, meditation and breathwork – tools for lifelong inner development.
en.benefits4_desc: Deep knowledge of anatomy, physiology and the mental – help yourself, family and friends to a healthier life.
en.benefits5_desc: Become part of a healthy, inspiring community. Many create an entirely new lifestyle and career from the training.
en.benefits6_desc: Learn to stand in front of a group with confidence, clarity and presence – a skill that extends far beyond the yoga mat.
en.cta_text: Get the schedule and apply today. Next cohort starts soon.
